hero.title: All-in-One Developer Hub
hero.subtitle: A suite of powerful, fast, and secure tools for modern developers. Everything runs in your browser.

clientSide.title: 100% Client-Side
clientSide.desc: Your data never leaves your browser. Secure and private by design.

fast.title: Blazing Fast
fast.desc: No server latency. Tools are instant and lightweight.

free.title: Always Free
free.desc: No tracking, no ads. Built for developers by developers.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.p1: DevTools Hub was created with a single mission: to provide developers with a reliable, fast, and secure set of utilities for their everyday workflow. We understand the importance of privacy, which is why all our tools run 100% locally in your browser. No data is ever sent to a server.
aboutUs.p2: Whether you are decoding tokens, formatting messy code, or generating secure UUIDs, we've got you covered with a clean and distraction-free environment built entirely on modern web standards.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple, secure, and privacy-first tools for your daily development tasks.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Your privacy is our top priority. Learn how we handle your data.
privacy.intro: At DevTools Hub, we take your privacy seriously. Our platform is designed with a privacy-first approach.

section1.title: 100% Client-Side Processing
section1.content: All tools on this platform run entirely in your browser. We do not use servers to process your data, meaning your code, JSON, tokens, and images never leave your machine.

section2.title: No Data Storage
section2.content: We do not store your inputs, outputs, or any personal information. Once you close the tab or refresh the page, all session data is cleared from your browser's memory.

section3.title: Analytics and Cookies
section3.content: We may use minimal, privacy-respecting analytics to understand how our tools are used. No personal identifiers are collected, and we do not use tracking cookies for advertising.

github.title: GitHub Repository
github.description: DevTools Hub is an open-source project. Contribute on GitHub.
github.intro: We believe in the power of open-source. DevTools Hub is built by developers, for developers.

contribute.title: Contribute to the Project
contribute.content: Found a bug? Have a feature request? Feel free to open an issue or submit a pull request. We welcome contributions from the community.

license.title: MIT License
license.content: The project is licensed under the MIT License, which means you are free to use, modify, and distribute the code.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.description: Stay updated with the latest features and improvements.

v1.title: Initial Release
items: Launched DevTools Hub with 15+ essential tools.
Full support for English and Urdu localization.

v1_1.title: UX & Performance Update
items: Enhanced HTML Previewer with internal scrolling and beautifier.
Added Bootstrap 5 and Font Awesome support to Previewer.
Reduced bundle size and optimized hydration performance.
